Warning for wind and low relative humidity, which is in effect
from 1 PM this afternoon to 8 PM CDT this evening.

mph.

burning is not recommended.

items.title: Winter Weather Advisory issued April 3 at 2:38AM CDT until April 4 at 7:00AM CDT by NWS La Crosse WI
items.summary:
...FREEZING RAIN IMPACTING NORTH CENTRAL WISCONSIN THIS EVENING INTO
THE OVERNIGHT...

.Freezing rain develops this evening and continues through the
overnight for north central Wisconsin. This impacts Taylor County
and northeast Clark County. The greatest ice accumulations are in
eastern Taylor County. There is a tight gradient in ice
accumulations owing to where the freezing line sets up, so
additional shifts in the southward extent of the ice may be needed
later in the day.

* WHAT...Freezing
items.area: Taylor; Clark

items.title: Small Craft Advisory issued April 3 at 2:23AM EDT until April 4 at 7:00AM EDT by NWS Boston/Norton MA
items.summary:
* WHAT...For the first Small Craft Advisory, east winds around
10 kt and seas 3 to 5 feet. For the second Small Craft
Advisory, southwest winds 10 to 20 kt with gusts up to 25 kt
and seas 3 to 5 feet expected.

* WHERE...Coastal waters east of Ipswich Bay and the Stellwagen
Bank National Marine Sanctuary.

* WHEN...For the first Small Craft Advisory, until 6 AM EDT
early this morning. For the second Small Craft Advisory, from
2 PM this afternoon to 7 AM EDT Saturday.

* IMPACTS...Conditions will

items.title: Small Craft Advisory issued April 3 at 2:23AM EDT until April 4 at 7:00AM EDT by NWS Boston/Norton MA
items.summary:
* WHAT...Southwest winds 15 to 25 kt with gusts up to 30 kt and
seas 4 to 6 feet expected.

* WHERE...In Massachusetts coastal waters, Coastal waters from
Provincetown MA to Chatham MA to Nantucket MA out 20 nm and
Coastal Waters extending out to 25 nm South of Marthas
Vineyard and Nantucket. In Rhode Island coastal waters,
Coastal Waters from Montauk NY to Marthas Vineyard extending
out to 20 nm South of Block Island.

* WHEN...From 2 PM this afternoon to 7 AM EDT Saturday.

* IMPACTS...Conditi

items.title: Small Craft Advisory issued April 3 at 2:23AM EDT until April 4 at 5:00AM EDT by NWS Boston/Norton MA
items.summary:
* WHAT...Southwest winds 15 to 20 kt with gusts up to 25 kt and
seas 2 to 4 feet expected.

* WHERE...Portions of Massachusetts coastal waters and Rhode
Island coastal waters.

* WHEN...From 4 PM this afternoon to 5 AM EDT Saturday.

* IMPACTS...Conditions will be hazardous to small craft.

items.title: Dense Fog Advisory issued April 3 at 2:20AM EDT until April 3 at 2:00PM EDT by NWS Upton NY
items.summary:
* WHAT...For the Dense Fog Advisory, dense fog will reduce
visibility to 1 NM or less. For the Small Craft Advisory, south
winds 10 to 20 kt with gusts up to 30 kt and seas 4 to 7 feet.

* WHERE...Sandy Hook NJ to Montauk Point NY out 20 nm.

* WHEN...For the Dense Fog Advisory, until 2 PM EDT this
afternoon. For the Small Craft Advisory, until 6 AM EDT
Saturday.

* IMPACTS...Conditions will be hazardous to small craft. Low
visibility will make navigation difficult.
items.area: Moriches Inlet NY to Montauk Point NY out 20 nm; Fire Island Inlet NY to Moriches Inlet NY out 20 nm; Sandy Hook NJ to Fire Island Inlet NY out 20 nm

items.title: Dense Fog Advisory issued April 3 at 2:20AM EDT until April 3 at 2:00PM EDT by NWS Upton NY
items.summary:
* WHAT...Dense fog will reduce visibility to 1 NM or less.

* WHERE...Long Island Sound, New York Harbor, Peconic and
Gardiners Bays, and South Shore Bays from Jones Inlet through
Shinnecock Bay.

* WHEN...Until 2 PM EDT this afternoon.

* IMPACTS...Low visibility will make navigation difficult.
items.area: Long Island Sound East of New Haven CT/Port Jefferson NY to the Mouth of the Connecticut River; Long Island Sound East of the Mouth of the Connecticut River; Long Island Sound West of New Haven CT/Port Jefferson NY; New York Harbor; Peconic and Gardiners Bays; South Shore Bays from Jones Inlet through Shinnecock Bay

* WHERE...Intra Coastal Waters from Schoodic Point, ME to

items.title: Flood Watch issued April 3 at 1:02AM CDT until April 9 at 7:00PM CDT by NWS Chicago IL
items.summary:
...The National Weather Service in Chicago IL has issued a Flood
Watch for the following rivers in Indiana...

Kankakee River at Shelby affecting Newton and Lake IN Counties.

For the Kankakee River...including Shelby...flooding is possible.

* WHAT...Flooding is possible.

* WHERE...Kankakee River from Near I-65 and De Motte downstream to
IL/IN state line, including the Shelby gauge.

* WHEN...From Saturday morning to Thursday evening.

* IMPACTS...At 10.5 feet, Water overflows low-lying river
items.area: Lake; Newton
